name: PAYDAY 3
short_description: PAYDAY 3 is the ultimate co-op FPS crime fantasy. Choose between stealth or loud playstyles, customize your character, and get ready to pull off the perfect heist.
detailed_description:
YEAR 1 EDITION

The PAYDAY 3: Year 1 Edition offers everything needed to get started in the heisting world. The Year 1 Edition includes all major content releases, along with the many free updates and improvements released over the game’s first year.

It features:

  • The base game Payday 3

  • Payday 3 Year 1 Pass: The Season Pass includes four major DLC bundles - Syntax Error, Boys in Blue, Houston Breakout and Fear & Greed - each introducing a new heist, a variety of weapons, and numerous cosmetics.

  • Preacher pack (including 1 outfit, 1 weapon)

  • Drifter pack (including 1 outfit, 1 weapon)

  • Heavy Hitter pack (including 1 outfit, 1 weapon)

  • Assassin pack (including 1 outfit, 1 weapon)

  • Island skin

  • Dark Sterling Mask

  • Skull of Liberty Mask and Golden Slate Gloves


About the Game

PAYDAY 3 is a four-player co-op FPS where you live out the ultimate heist fantasy. Tackle robberies in stealth to empty vaults without leaving a trace. Or charge in guns blazing, hold out against relentless enemy pressure, and make your escape with the big score. An extensive skill tree, weapon modifications and cosmetic customization provide near endless variety, no matter your playstyle.

Mask up and become a legend. Over a decade of daring heists have given the Payday Gang a fearsome reputation. Customize your look, loadout and skills, and carve your place in this infamous crew.

Embrace your greediest ambitions on a New York City crime spree. Target banks, nightclubs, shipyards and more: How much can you steal before the heat becomes too much?

Will you succeed through meticulous preparation or raw violence?

PAYDAY gives you the tools for both, but escalation is inevitable. Guards, cops, SWAT and Special Units will combine forces to take you out.

The perfect heist demands coordination. Whether you split up or stick together, you’ll need to overcome escalating threats as a team. In PAYDAY 3, your crew is your greatest weapon.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
